title: Cardi B's Credit Card Trouble
summary: Cardi B is a famous rapper who had a big problem with her credit card. She lost her American Express card, and thieves used it to buy expensive things like designer clothes and Apple products. They spent $60,000 in total, which is a lot of money. Cardi B found out because her phone gets a notification every time her card is used. She was on tour and not shopping much, so she knew something was wrong when she saw the big purchases. She got CCTV footage showing four men using her card and wants them to go to jail. Cardi B is very rich but still watches her money closely. She told her fans about this in a live video on Instagram.

people who steal things that are not theirs

video from cameras that record what happens in a place

questions.correct_answer: She wants them to go to jail

background_read: Cardi B is a famous rapper known for songs like 'I Like It' and 'Bodak Yellow'. She is very rich, with a net worth over $88 million, but she still cares about her money. Credit card fraud happens when someone uses another person's card without permission to buy things. This can be a big problem because it steals money and can hurt people's finances. Cardi B was on her Little Miss Drama tour when this happened, which means she was traveling to perform for fans. She uses Instagram to connect with her fans and share news.
Article_Structure: WHO: Cardi B, a famous rapper, and four thieves
WHAT: Thieves spent $60,000 on Cardi B's credit card without her permission
WHERE: At Saks Fifth Avenue and an Apple Store, shared on Instagram
WHY: To report credit card fraud and warn others about being careful with money

perspectives.description: Cardi B feels angry and wants justice because her money was stolen, showing that even rich people can be victims of crime.
